title: Ecotones
description: Adds a new world type with hundreds of biomes to explore and discover!
body:
Ecotones is a biome overhaul mod for Fabric that attempts to capture the essence of the real world's flora by filling each biome with life, where each generated tree, shrub, and rock is unique in where it generates and the shape. The end result is biome generation that feels natural and incredibly diverse, where even the same biome can feel different from one corner to the other. Currently, the mod adds over 70 distinct biomes, or over 200 when considering variants.

 

To use this mod, you need to use the "Ecotones" world type when making a new world, or set "level-type=ecotones" when making a new server.

### Discord Server

https://discord.gg/EwQmvQtshV

Join to talk about Ecotones and get information about the next updates!

### Mod compatibility

Ecotones includes explicit compat for these mods:

- EMI, for recipe viewing

- Aurora's Decorations blocks will show up in Ecotones worldgen

- Yttr blocks and biomes will show up in Ecotones worldgen

- Traverse and Terrestria biomes will show up in Ecotones worldgen
